ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ballistic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "ammo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ammunition type */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance in yards */,
  "drop" REAL /* Drop in mils */,
  "wind_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "velocity" INTEGER /* Velocity in feet per second */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* Energy in foot-pounds */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental condition under which the data was collected */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury (inHg) */,
  "barrel_length" REAL /* Length of the barrel in inches */,
  "muzzle_velocity" INTEGER /* Muzzle velocity in feet per second (fps) at the start of the trajectory */,
  "time_of_flight" REAL /* Time in seconds it takes for the bullet to travel the specified distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballistic_data_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballistic_data_ammo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ammo_id") REFERENCES ammo_types ("ammo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ammo_types" (
  "ammo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ammunition type */,
  "ammo_name" TEXT /* Name of the ammunition */,
  "caliber" TEXT /* Caliber of the ammunition */,
  "grain" INTEGER /* Grain of the bullet */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the ammunition */,
  "bullet_type" TEXT /* Type of bullet (e.g., full metal jacket, hollow point) */,
  "powder_type" TEXT /* Type of powder used in the ammunition */,
  "primer_type" TEXT /* Type of primer used in the ammunition */,
  "case_material" TEXT /* Material of the cartridge case (e.g., brass, steel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ammo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury (inHg) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, military, recreational shooter) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "ammo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ammunition type used in the report */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trajectory, inventory, comparison) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ammo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ammo_id") REFERENCES ammo_types ("ammo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "ammo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ammunition type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ammunition in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ammo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ammo_id") REFERENCES ammo_types ("ammo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ammo_supplier" (
  "ammo_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "ammo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ammunition type */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the contract with the supplier expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ammo_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ammo_supplier_ammo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ammo_id") REFERENCES ammo_types ("ammo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ammo_supplier_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Functionality within the platform */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, edit) */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time of the last access to the functionality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user accessed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ammo_inventory_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory history entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity changed */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  "by_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the inventory change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ammo_inventory_history_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ammo_inventory_history_by_user FOREIGN KEY ("by_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "default_functionality" TEXT /* Default functionality assigned to the role upon login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
